sellers_note: EXOTIC, THRILLING, OPEN-AIR, NO-ACCIDENT, OUTSTANDING! The 2023 Chevrolet Corvette Stingray Convertible 3LT represents one of the most exciting performance-car values in the world. With its exotic mid-engine layout, breathtaking acceleration, premium luxury appointments, and unmistakable styling, the C8 Corvette fundamentally changed expectations for America's sports car. Delivering supercar looks and performance at a fraction of the price of many European rivals, the Stingray continues to be one of the most celebrated performance vehicles of the modern era. The eighth-generation Corvette marked the most significant transformation in the model's history. Buyers often compare it with vehicles such as the Porsche 911 Cabriolet, Audi R8 Spyder, McLaren GT, Mercedes-AMG GT Roadster, and even exotic Italian sports cars, yet the Corvette distinguishes itself through its incredible performance-per-dollar ratio, everyday usability, and distinctly American character. For this one, the critics sounded more like lifelong sports-car enthusiasts. The C8 Stingray earned widespread praise for its mid-engine balance, world-class performance, everyday drivability, and ability to compete with vehicles costing substantially more. Named to numerous Car of the Year and Performance Car of the Year lists. Praised for delivering exotic-car performance at a fraction of the price. Commended for its revolutionary mid-engine architecture. Recognized for outstanding handling and driver engagement. Widely regarded as one of the most important Corvettes ever produced. The odometer is hovering around the 13,251-mile mark, and it has some supplemental factory coverage remaining. Corrosion Limited Warranty Covers corrosion perforation according to Chevrolet warranty provisions. Active through applicable factory coverage periods. In most cases, we can provide expanded options to cover each vehicle with a valuable, comprehensive warranty for years to come! Even before its extensive options list is considered, the 3LT trim places this Corvette near the top of the Stingray hierarchy. Premium features include GT2 seating, premium leather-wrapped interior surfaces, Bose Performance Series audio, head-up display, Performance Data Recorder capability, wireless Apple CarPlay, wireless Android Auto, navigation, heated and ventilated seats, heated steering wheel, memory settings, front curb-view cameras, and a wide range of luxury and performance-focused technology. Power comes from Chevrolet's legendary naturally aspirated 6.2-liter LT2 V8 engine producing 490 horsepower and 465 lb-ft of torque. Paired with an 8-speed dual-clutch transmission, the Stingray delivers explosive acceleration, lightning-fast gear changes, and an exhilarating soundtrack. The dual-clutch gearbox combines the convenience of an automatic with the responsiveness expected from a world-class sports car. This particular Stingray was configured with an extraordinary collection of factory performance and appearance upgrades that significantly elevate its capability and desirability. Z51 Performance Package Performance Rear Axle Ratio. High-Performance Tires. Z51-Specific Rear Spoiler. Z51 Performance Suspension. Electronic Limited-Slip Differential. Z51 Performance Brakes with Z51 Logo Calipers. Heavy-Duty Cooling System. Performance Exhaust. Widely considered the must-have package for enthusiast drivers. Magnetic Selective Ride Control Continuously adapts suspension settings in real time. Delivers an exceptional balance of comfort and performance. One of the most desirable Corvette options available.
